title: Peripheral Blood Mononuclear Cells, HV, Baseline MECFS_101
extract_protocol_ch1: RNA was extracted from PBMC’s of participants using miRNeasy Micro Kit (QIAGEN). | Dual index libraries were constructed with at least one unique index per each patient library using the TruSeq Stranded Total RNA HT Kit (Illumina).
description: Peripheral Blood Mononuclear Cells, HV, Baseline | Illuminasoftware bcl2fastq v.2.17
data_processing: Illuminasoftware bcl2fastq v.2.17 | RNA sequences were subjected to quality control  through FastQC: http://www.bioinformatics.babraham.ac.uk/projects/fastqc | Adapters were removed using Trimmomatic: https://github.com/timflutre/trimmomatic | Alignment to the human genome (GRCh38) using STAR | Gene expression levels were quantified using FeaturesCounts | Assembly: GRCh38 | Supplementary files format and content: tab-delimited text files include gene expression levels for each sample
